test.name: verifier creation paiement

kw.name: Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=creatednow, url=https://6957bb19f7ea690182d2e402.mockapi.io/api/andouv1, headers={}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=False, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.msg: POST Request : url=https://6957bb19f7ea690182d2e402.mockapi.io/api/andouv1/andouv1api path_url=/api/andouv1/andouv1api headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '74', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"Card_number": "4970100000000014", "amount": "1845", "status": "SUCCESS"}'

C:\Users\GENIUS\AppData\Roaming\Python\Python311\site-packages\urllib3\connectionpool.py:1097: InsecureRequestWarning: Unverified HTTPS request is being made to host '6957bb19f7ea690182d2e402.mockapi.io'. Adding certificate verification is strongly advised. See: https://urllib3.readthedocs.io/en/latest/advanced-usage.html#tls-warnings warnings.warn(
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Status Should Be
kw.doc: Fails if response status code is different than the expected.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.

kw.name: Should Not Be Empty
kw.doc: Verifies that the given item is not empty.

kw.name: Should Match Regexp
kw.doc: Fails if ``string`` does not match ``pattern`` as a regular expression.

test.doc: regex pour 16 chiffres stricte sans espaces et sans lettres etc ex: 1234567890234567

kw.name: Disconnect From Database
kw.msg: No open database connection to close
